summary: There is no evidence indicating that pediatric housestaff have influence over test ordering in the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit; instead, neonatologists, interdisciplinary teams, and specialty staff hold primary responsibility for diagnosing and evaluating infants. Therefore, based on available literature, pediatrics housestaff do not exercise significant influence in this context. $\boxed{\text{B}}$
